items.name: Crimson Flame Coat [PBR]
items.description:
рҹ”Ҙ Bold вҖў Stylish вҖў Adventurous
This vibrant red coat isnвҖҷt just clothing вҖ” itвҖҷs a statement. The rich crimson color immediately catches the eye, while the belted waist and flowing cut give it a sleek silhouette full of confidence. Subtle flame-like patterns near the hem add a sense of energy and motion, as if the coat carries its own spark.
рҹ’Ў Why YouвҖҷll Love It
вқӨпёҸ Crimson red fabric that stands out in any crowd
рҹ”Ҙ Subtle flame accents for a touch of dynamic flair
рҹ§ө Detailed belts and seams for depth and realism
вңЁ PBR textures that make the coat come alive
рҹҺ® Ideal for fantasy, stylish streetwear, or heroic avatars
рҹ”Қ Keywords: red coat, crimson fashion, long jacket, stylish outfit, flame design, Roblox PBR clothing, bold fashion, fantasy wear, heroic style
This coat is for players who want to look confident, adventurous, and unforgettable вҖ” a piece that burns bright without being too loud.
High-quality PBR textures included.
